prompt: I have uncommitted changes I want to keep. Stash them, pull the latest changes from the remote, then pop my stash to restore my work.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: git_stash
tools.description: Stash or restore uncommitted changes in a git repository.

message.description: Optional message for the stash (save only)

tools.name: git_pull
tools.description: Fetch and integrate changes from a remote repository.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a git repository.

rubric: 1=no tool calls or wrong tools entirely, 2=only stashes or only pulls but not the full sequence, 3=attempts all three steps but wrong order (e.g. pull before stash save), 4=correct order stash save then pull then stash pop but minor parameter issues, 5=perfect chain: git_stash save, then git_pull, then git_stash pop, all with correct repo_path
